rationale: Educ. Code §46.010 governs guaranteed facilities yield for joint district projects and references §46.005. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict.
quote: each district is entitled to a guaranteed facilities yield amount of state and local funds that is 20 percent higher than the amount to which the district would otherwise be entitled under Section 46.005.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on local funds share is possible but not addressed by this provision.
